name: Magellan Financial Group Limited
analysis: MFG's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 15% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$9.7600, stop A$8.7714, target A$11.5500 (1.81:1) — then trail it.
